title: The Rabbit Is Me
writer: Manfred Bieler, Christel Gräf, Kurt Maetzig
actors: Angelika Waller, Wolfgang Winkler, Alfred Müller
plot: The Rabbit Is Me was made in 1965 to encourage discussion of the democratization of East German society. In it, a young student has an affair with a judge who once sentenced her brother for political reasons; she eventually confro...
